description: Known WRITE tool call (create_work_order) emitted as single-quoted Python-repr pseudo-JSON ({'name': ..., 'arguments': {...}}), which json.loads rejects. Provenance: PR #55 code review, detector-gap family (4) verified by execution -- the payload passed both seams raw because it never parsed. Fixed by an ast.literal_eval fallback parse (safe, no code execution) before shape matching; the leak is suppressed and the write NEVER executes.
user_messages: create a work order for P-201
